primary.description: Spicy Orange - Use for primary CTAs, active states, and key brand moments.

secondary.description: Charcoal - Use for headings, high contrast text, and dark mode backgrounds.

accent.description: Fresh Lime - Use for success states, 'New' badges, and vegan/healthy indicators.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold shadow-lg shadow-orange-500/20 transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/90 rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/10 rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent/10 text-accent-foreground hover:text-accent rounded-md px-4 py-2

cards.menu_item: bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-border rounded-xl overflow-hidden hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors group
cards.dashboard_stat: bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 p-6 rounded-xl border border-border shadow-sm
cards.table_card: aspect-square flex flex-col items-center justify-center rounded-xl border-2 transition-all cursor-pointer hover:scale-105

inputs.default: flex h-12 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-primary focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

customer_app.structure: Sticky bottom nav for cart, vertical scroll for menu categories. Hero section with appetizing imagery.

admin_dashboard.structure: Fixed sidebar (dark), scrollable main content (light/gray). Top header for search/profile.

kitchen_display.structure: Full screen, high contrast. Columns for 'Pending', 'Cooking', 'Ready'. Large text for readability from distance.

hero_background.usage: Login page background, Landing page hero

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Manrope' for all headings to give a modern, friendly feel.
Use 'Inter' for body text for maximum legibility.
Implement a 'Dark Sidebar' for the Admin Dashboard to distinguish it from the customer view.
For the Customer App, use a 'Light Mode' base with 'Spicy Orange' (#F97316) accents to stimulate appetite.
Kitchen Dashboard must be High Contrast. Use large cards with clear status indicators (Red/Yellow/Green).
Use the provided image URLs for the initial menu population.
Ensure all buttons in the customer view are 'Pill Shaped' (rounded-full) for a mobile-app feel.
Use 'Sonner' for all toast notifications (Order placed, Table ready, etc.).
Do not use generic gradients. Use solid colors or subtle textures.
Ensure all interactive elements have 'data-testid' attributes.
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop' - no generic centered layouts.
Micro-animations on all interactions (hover, click, focus).
